below_tabulated_energy_policy: Clamp to the lowest direct-DCS slice.
data_version: Data Version 3.4 D + D^+ pure-elastic cross section and angle CDF rebuilt DCS-first from Krstic direct DCS fits.
runtime_interpolation_policy: DCS-first: interpolate the elastic-total and spin-exchange p(theta,E)=2*pi*sin(theta)*d sigma/d Omega kernels separately in log(E)-log(p), subtract them to form pure elastic, clip negative pure points according to negative_pure_policy, then integrate to sigma_t/sigma_mt and inverse CDF.
